body.interpretation: Good body alignment with low stability and excessive movement. Generally attentive posture with occasional attention shifts. Shows positive facial expressiveness.

speech_analysis.speech_summary: The candidate demonstrated strong voice quality and high energy during their speech, contributing positively to overall engagement. However, there are areas for improvement, particularly in communication clarity and confidence, which could enhance the effectiveness of their delivery. Maintaining a moderate pace and further developing professionalism will also strengthen their presentation skills. Overall, the candidate shows potential with a solid foundation to build upon.

transcript.text:
Hello sir, my name is Harsh. I am speaking from a company named Conta People. So, we know how beneficial drinking water is for us, our tension ends, our screen screen stays good. There are many benefits of drinking water, but no one remembers to drink water. So, for that, our company has launched a product, a small bottle. Here is this product. It has many features, like look how amazing it looks. It is very lightweight. Water can stay cold in it for 24 hours. One day Fill water, drink cold water by next day, what a great feature.
But there is one feature in this that has come to India for the first time, that is, we have set an alarm in it, so you can set a timer on it and at that time it will keep ringing and reminding you that it is time for you to drink water.
So it's good, sir, it will remind you, it will be your companion in your fitness journey, this is an excellent product.
So for the launch now, our company has kept I would get it for 20% cheaper, madam. Thank you.
